core_payload.content:
# Night Shift Autonomy

## 1. Role
Night Shift Autonomy will become the mature unattended operating mode of N1Hub, shaping what the system may do while the human is offline and how that work must return for daylight review.

## 2. Future Shift Contract
This mode will coordinate execution windows, day-vs-night behavior, budget discipline, cooldown posture, handoff rules, and mutation boundaries with much more explicit operator and wallet awareness. Night work will remain bounded, reviewable, and preference-aware instead of merely aggressive.

## 3. Operational Consequence
The system will be able to compound useful progress overnight while still producing clear morning return paths, safer Dream-first mutation posture, and better protection against runaway cost or unreviewed structural change.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Night Shift Autonomy supports To Dig Deep by making unattended depth calmer, more legible, and more trustworthy.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Night Shift Autonomy defines the future mature unattended mode of N1Hub: stronger shift shaping, richer morning handoffs, tighter mutation boundaries, better wallet and preference awareness, and more legible control-plane oversight while humans are offline.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
